title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DRDO Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
DRDO Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
